title: floral crunchy venezuelan grape tomatoes bowl
description: a light and refreshing bowl featuring boiled grape tomatoes, crunchy plantain chips, and a hint of floral cilantro. perfect for a buddhist temple-friendly meal prep option.

ingredients.name: plantain chips
ingredients.notes: crunchy and fried, add at the end as a garnish.

ingredients.name: fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: chopped and added at the end for a fresh flavor.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: minced and used to season the tomatoes.

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: added at the end to brighten the flavors.

instructions: bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. add the grape tomatoes and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
drain the tomatoes and transfer them to a bowl.
heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
add the lemon juice to the bowl with the tomatoes and toss to combine.
